title: Eva 04 images
wikitext:
[]: Eva 04 images             Quote Post by V » Fri Apr 27, 2007 9:05 am Can anyone who has pics of Eva 04 please post 'em here? I've been looking all over but can find few. I mean hopefully official Gainax artwork, or even not-entirely-official omake artwork, but frankly I'd take anything. Eeven kawaii cartoons. I've heard that "official" concept art or whatever was released by Gainax and I want to know all of them that were made. I got in a big discussion with someone else about whether it is white or silver, and they keep pointing to this picture of a white 04 which I think isn't right; I'm pretty sure its silver. Well, pics are always fun. Except for those pics where the unarmored Evas are put into "comical"...."romantic positions"...that I can do without. But I always get kind of fascinated by 04 just because we don't really see the frakking thing and they dont' develop it more (I seriously hope Rebuild or live action devotes a 2 minute section to actually showing it in NERV-2)

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Apr 27, 2007 10:41 am This is the only one I have handy:

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Apr 27, 2007 11:42 am that's great; where did you get it?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Apr 27, 2007 11:51 am V wrote: that's great; where did you get it?

[]:             Quote Post by ThroneofDravaris » Fri Apr 27, 2007 11:54 am Invert a picture of Unit 03. Basically the same thing.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Fri Apr 27, 2007 12:08 pm More accurately, I'm looking for proof that it is silver and not white

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Fri Apr 27, 2007 3:41 pm V wrote: More accurately, I'm looking for proof that it is silver and not white

[]:             Quote Post by Jay911 » Fri Apr 27, 2007 4:54 pm The Revoltech model is silver.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Apr 27, 2007 8:12 pm Ornette wrote: V wrote: that's great; where did you get it?

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Fri Apr 27, 2007 8:31 pm Interesting

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Apr 28, 2007 1:06 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: It's by Nephilim , aka Claudio Manzati. You might remember some of his other pieces. He also did a Unit 03 version of this, which as I recall was drawn from a kaiyodo figure. He also did the one of Unit 01 and Lilith attached in dogma, as well as a series of the harpies with their different injuries.

[]: ive found some i had a while back             Quote Post by emotionless-drifter » Mon May 14, 2007 5:28 am This is just one with eva 04 blurred in tha background. (oh and also note the now acquainted 4 on shinjis bio suit This is a pic from an original gainax project. here is a production model ill just post a couple more pics here in case u want them.

[]:             Quote Post by Operation Yashima » Mon May 14, 2007 6:13 pm THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: emotionless-drifter wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Mon May 14, 2007 6:17 pm I always liked Eva 03 and 04, they had both the best design and color scemes

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Mon May 14, 2007 6:19 pm Kyoko ftw.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Mon May 14, 2007 7:12 pm IIRC that is the official picture...It is also on Wiki. When youare about to ask anything about any anime, look on Wiki first.

[]:             Quote Post by lftwgr » Tue May 15, 2007 12:21 am Here's the link to the toy sold at evastore: [url]http://www.evastore.jp/index.cgi?rm=detail&id=1141&genre=50_figure&page=2&key=&8%A1%E04=2%A1%DE0[/url] It's silver by the way. (Click on the pics for enlarged versions)

[]: meowchow             Quote Post by emotionless-drifter » Tue May 15, 2007 5:41 am i probably have some others around so ill have a look for you and i may be able to get some of a friends fan art if you are interested.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Wed May 16, 2007 10:38 pm Well I just need something that proves its silver; when its white people mistake it for an MP Eva
